description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a streamlined, angular fuselage. The wings are long, thin, and dramatically swept back, giving the aircraft a predatory, bird-like appearance. The surface is metallic gray with blue accents running along the wings, and the body features subtle paneling and texture details. The cockpit is centrally located at the front, with a dark, tinted canopy that blends smoothly into the fuselage. Twin jet engines are mounted at the rear, integrated into the body for minimal drag. The tail section is minimalistic, with no traditional vertical stabilizer, emphasizing the aircraft's advanced, unconventional design.
description: A futuristic, metallic gray airplane with long, swept-back wings, blue accents, and a streamlined, angular body. It features a front-mounted cockpit and twin rear jet engines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, central cockpit, and wide, swept-back wings with blue accents.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin, angular fuselage, swept-back wings, and rear-mounted jet engines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin jet engine exhausts and the broad, angular wingspan.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the left profile, emphasizing the wing sweep and engine integration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with highly swept, angular wings and pronounced anhedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Minimalist tail with no conventional vertical stabilizer; features a blended, integrated rear fuselage.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Not visibly extended; likely retractable landing gear, but not apparent in current views.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single cockpit with a dark, streamlined canopy integrated into the fuselage.
